response:
[IMPLEMENTATION OF GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ON SCIKIT-LEARN LOAD DIGITS DATASET WITH CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING]  
[COMPARISON WITH MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL]  

[MODULE 1: DATA PREPARATION]  
LOAD DIGITS DATASET IS LOADED AND PREPARED FOR MODEL TRAINING. DATA IS SPLIT INTO TRAINING AND TEST SETS. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED USING K-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION WITH K=5. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH CV.  

[MODULE 2: MODEL TRAINING]  
GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL IS TRAINED ON THE TRAINING SET. HYPERPARAMETERS ARE TUNED TO IMPROVE MODEL PERFORMANCE. MODEL IS EVALUATED USING ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE ON THE TEST SET.  

[MODULE 3: MODEL COMPARISON]  
MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL IS TRAINED AND COMPARISON IS MADE BETWEEN GAUSSIAN AND MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODELS. PERFORMANCE IS EVALUATED USING ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE.  

[MODULE 4: RESULTS AND ANALYSIS]  
CURRENT MODEL PERFORMANCE IS REPORTED. CURRENT MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE THAN MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. CURRENT MODEL IS MORE ACCURATE AND MORE EFFICIENT.
